essence: Monitors and intervenes in autonomous vehicle trials and operations to ensure safety and regulatory compliance.

identity.title: Autonomous Vehicle Safety Operator
identity.summary: Oversees AV test runs, monitors system behaviour, takes manual control when necessary, and documents incidents for engineering teams and regulators.

salary.notes: Roles in urban trials or with major OEMs often include additional training and allowances.

qualifications: Full driving licence and experience in vehicle operations
Training in AV safety protocols and incident reporting
Good situational awareness and communication skills
Basic understanding of AV systems and sensors

lifestyle.description: Work is often shift‑based around test schedules, with time in vehicles and at control centres. Requires readiness to respond quickly and document findings accurately.

habits: Monitors sensor feeds and vehicle telemetry
Intervenes safely when systems behave unexpectedly
Logs incidents and collaborates with engineers
Supports public demonstrations and regulatory audits
